name: Short Life 2
author: Poki
description: Short Life 2 is a unique game where you must rely on your survival skills to pass many dangerous obstacles. Dodge spikes, swinging blades, and explosive mines and try to survive every tricky level. The better you are at avoiding death, the more stars you will collect. Make sure to collect as many stars as possible, so you can play as every unlockable character in the game. Guide our heroes through all the different stages and brag to your friends about how long you've lasted in this unforgiving platformer! How to play Short Life 2? Move - A/D or Left/Right Arrow keys Jump - W or Up Arrow key Crouch - S or Down Arrow key Who created Short Life 2? Short Life 2 is created by Gametornado, based in the Czech Republic. It's the sequel to Short Life. Gametornado is the name behind Bow Mania , Death Chase , Eugene's Life , Jelly Cat , Lucky Life , Parkour Jump , Rio Rex , Short Life , and Short Ride . The studio's other works include Rio Rex, LA Rex, NY Rex, and London Rex. How can I play Short Life 2 for free? You can play Short Life 2 for free on Poki. Can I play Short Life 2 on mobile devices and desktop? Short Life 2 can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
